name: projects/10033276352334490527/screens/c52cf9550239469b88a45b678a22e2bc
title: A set of four 16-bit SNES-style pixel art sports icons on a dark charcoal background. Icons: a baseball (AVG), a home plate with a flame (HR), a runner crossing home (RBI), and a calendar (recent performance). Vibrant colors, sharp pixel edges, no gradients, retro video game aesthetic.
